The minimum supported version is 11.0.0. Check the community dialects project for available legacy versions. 2026-06-18T11:45:55.726+05:30 WARN 6048 --- [product-service] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: PostgreSQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-18T11:45:56.380+05:30 INFO 6048 --- [product-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists products cascade Hibernate: create table products (stock integer, unit_price numeric(38,2), product_id uuid not null, brand varchar(255), category varchar(255) check (category in ('SHIRTS','TROUSERS','SHOES','ACCESSORIES','OUTERWEAR','SUITS')), color varchar(255), description varchar(255), material varchar(255), name varchar(255), size varchar(255), primary key (product_id)) 2026-06-18T11:45:56.425+05:30 INFO 6048 --- [product-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-18T11:45:56.973+05:30 WARN 6048 --- [product-service] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default.
